arts.ttl: Transfer news and rumours today: Yang Min-hyeok to QPR, Gavin Bazunu to Udinese, Karim Adeyemi update
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest transfer news and rumours, including Yang Min-Hyeok to Queens Park Rangers, Gavin Bazunu to Udinese and an update on Karim Adeyemi's Borussia Dortmund future.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund confirm Mike Tullberg will remain on the bench against Heidenheim
arts.sum: BVB sporting director Lars Ricken has confirmed that Borussia Dortmund's search for a new permanent head-coach will stretch through the weekend.

arts.ttl: Mats Hummels on Borussia Dortmund crisis: “Some things one can see coming.”
arts.sum: Never shy about expressing his opinion, German footballing legend Mats Hummels has weighed in on the current Borussia Dortmund crisis.

arts.ttl: Five Borussia Dortmund teenagers to watch with Mike Tullberg in charge
arts.sum: Julien Duranville has racked up a goal, an assist and 14 appearances all told since making his senior Dortmund debut on the final day of the 2022/23 season, and is still four months inside his 19th birthday. A left-footed right winger, Cole Campbell can operate on either flank, but is at his most dangerous cutting inside on his stronger foot, which was the route to most of his 21 goals and 22 assists for BVB's academy teams.

arts.ttl: How Borussia Dortmund’s mangement conflicts have affected their squad planning
arts.sum: Bild has revealed how the ongoing issues in the Borussia Dortmund hierarchy have affected the club’s squad building in the past year. Sporting director Sebastian Kehl and squad planner Sven Mislintat…

arts.ttl: Transfer news and rumours: Victor Boniface to Al-Nassr, Luis Guilherme to Shakhtar Donetsk, Eli Junior Kroupi to Bournemouth
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest transfer news and rumours, including Victor Boniface to Al-Nassr, Luis Guilherme to West Ham United and Eli Junior Kroupi to Bournemouth.

arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund take on Shakhtar Donetsk in the Champions League on Wednesday night. Ahead of the clash, we’ve made a prediction for the game, provided our predicted line-ups for both teams, ...

arts.ttl: Champions League permuations as Liverpool, Arsenal, Man City and Aston Villa face decisive matches
arts.sum: The final fixtures of the group stage of the 2025 Champions League take place on Wednesday evening and with every side set to be in action throughout the evening, plenty could still happen

arts.ttl: “Current decision…” – Liverpool & Chelsea transfer target informs clubs of his choice
arts.sum: Despite links with Liverpool, Chelsea and Napoli, it seems Karim Adeyemi has informed interested clubs of his decision to stay with Borussia Dortmund. The German winger has been the subject of plenty of speculation this January, but Fabrizio Romano is now reporting that his current decision seems to be to stay with Dortmund for a […] The post “Current decision…” – Liverpool & Chelsea transfer target informs clubs of his choice appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Shakhtar Donetsk make £12m offer for West Ham flop who has played just six times since signing for £25m last summer
arts.sum: He is tied down to the London Stadium on a five-year deal but his time in English football could be over by Monday.
